summary: Completed testing of WaveWatch fixes including Watch Party removal, navigation updates, like/dislike counts, VIP button disabling, recommendations removal, and movies page improvements. Found critical issues with incomplete Watch Party removal.

critical_bugs.issue: Watch Party endpoints still exist and return 200 status - should be completely removed
critical_bugs.impact: Watch Party feature not properly removed as requested

integration_issues.issue: /watch-party route still accessible - should show 404 or redirect

design_issues.issue: Still contains 'LiveWatch (Secours)' link - should be removed

passed_tests: Frontend: Subscription page VIP/VIP+ buttons disabled with 'Bientot disponible'
Frontend: Dashboard page has no 'Recommandations pour vous' section
Frontend: Movie detail page shows like/dislike buttons with numeric counts
Frontend: Movies page displays multi-row grid layout (6 per row)
Frontend: Movies page filters panel works (platform, sort, year filters)
Frontend: Navigation does not contain 'Soiree Cine' or 'Watch Party' links
Integration: Like/dislike buttons show counts from /api/ratings/counts endpoint
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Complete Watch Party removal - remove all /api/watch-party endpoints from backend/server.py (lines 2301-2496), remove /watch-party route from frontend App.js, and remove 'LiveWatch (Secours)' from Navigation.js media dropdown

success_percentage.backend: 89% (32/36 tests passed - Watch Party endpoints still exist)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (most features working but Watch Party route accessible and LiveWatch Secours in nav)
success_percentage.integration: 90% (like/dislike counts working, filters working, but Watch Party not removed)
